Блок3-20 Травинка и фундамент.scriptText:
Здесь будет твой двор.

Роса на траве, солнце на свежем бетоне.

Место для дома мечты — с торгов. Торги Земли.
Блок3-20 Травинка и фундамент.whiskPrompts:
Extreme macro of morning dew drops on fresh green grass blades, sunrise bokeh, shallow depth of field, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark --ar 9:16
Macro of the clean edge of a freshly poured concrete foundation slab on a green plot, warm light, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Clean SHARP wide ground-level shot of ONE completed modern two-story house with wood and stone facade, flat roof and panoramic windows, landscaped yard with green lawn and stone path, golden hour, the WHOLE image in crisp sharp focus, deep depth of field, NO blur, NO bokeh, NO shallow depth of field, NO double exposure, NO overlapping images, NO ghosting, NO macro grass or objects in the foreground, single clean photograph, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
